# Dinheiro Web - Main Tasks Registry

**Last Updated**: May 12, 2026
**Project**: Dinheiro Web - Personal Finance Management

---

## Overview

This is the **MAIN TASKS FILE** for the Dinheiro Web project. All development tasks, features, bug fixes, refactoring work, and documentation updates are tracked here. Tasks are organized by status, priority, and type.

Use this file as the central hub to:
- View all active and completed work
- Track project progress
- Understand what's being worked on
- Identify available tasks to work on next
- See task dependencies and priorities
